_comment: Subtitle Configuration File - Edit these values to customize subtitle appearance

style._note_letter_spacing: Letter spacing within words. Negative values reduce spacing (tighter), positive values increase spacing (looser). Default: -2 for tighter letters.

positioning._comment: Alignment: 1=left, 2=center, 3=right, 4=top-left, 5=top-center, 6=top-right, 7=bottom-left, 8=bottom-center, 9=bottom-right. margin_vertical: higher value = higher up on screen

display._note_lines: Number of lines to display subtitles (1 or 2). Second line will always have fewer words than first line.
display._note_line_spacing: Line spacing in pixels (vertical space between lines). Higher value = more space.

subtitle_background._comment: Background settings for the subtitle area
subtitle_background._note: Color format: #RRGGBB. Transparency: 0-255 (0=fully transparent, 255=fully opaque). 255 = fully opaque black background.

transitions._note_fade: Fade durations in milliseconds. Higher values = slower fade. Set fade_enabled to false to disable transitions.

watermark._comment: Watermark settings - controls the watermark overlay on the video

size._comment: Size: 'auto' (maintain aspect ratio), or specify width in pixels (height will scale proportionally)

opacity._comment: Opacity: 0.0 (fully transparent) to 1.0 (fully opaque). 0.5 = half transparent
